plan.summary: Split conversation indexing from searching behind a stable facade with shared caches and paths.

prove.findings_disposition: Adversarial concerns are pre-existing product invariants or false positives: local user-owned full-corpus indexing intentionally has no size cap; saveIndex is already atomic; cache key, telemetry field and limit semantics were moved unchanged. No refactor regression found.

progress: dependency mapping and code scan complete
36 focused tests, TypeScript and build green
